title: Cook or Order In?
scenario: You have settled into your new flat. Ordering dinner on food-delivery apps costs about ₹250 a meal, and you are tempted to do it most nights. Cooking simple meals at home would cost roughly ₹80 a meal, but means buying basics and spending time in the kitchen.

choices.label: Cook on most weeknights and order in only on weekends
choices.lesson: Small daily habits compound. Cooking most nights keeps food costs low while still leaving room for an occasional treat.

choices.label: Order in most nights for convenience
choices.lesson: A ₹250 dinner feels harmless, but daily delivery can quietly become one of your biggest monthly outflows.
